title: lathyrus sylvestris var. latifolius
intro: Lathyrus sylvestris var. latifolius, also known as the broad-leaved pea, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
